description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named RPI-CI that runs on push and pull request events for devel and release branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow consists of two jobs: RPI and RPI-Integration. The RPI job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs the RPI toolchain, runs F prime CI tests, copies test artifacts, and uploads build outputs and logs as artifacts. The RPI-Integration job runs on a self-hosted runner, depends on the RPI job, downloads build artifacts, runs integration tests, and uploads logs as artifacts.
